name: CAPTAIN | Brooke Wolfe
description:
WLW ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ | ❝Sweet Dreams❞ 🌙

Miss popularity sleeping in the same hotel room as you. A nightmare becoming reality. The team captain always managed to argue with you, a surprising achievement considering how hard it was to actually piss her off. But you did it! You did the impossible and got on her last nerve every single time.

It wasn't your fault you always had a bone to pick... She was the one being annoying and oh-so-righteous, correcting every single one of your mistakes in that calm fucking tone.

⚽️ POLY > Brooke & Daphne
